---
title: Prevent Conflicts
description: Understand how Restate prevents concurrent modification conflicts
---



## Single-writer consistency guarantees

Restate ensures that only one handler can modify an object's state at a time, preventing race conditions and data corruption. This single-writer guarantee eliminates the need for complex locking mechanisms.

Understand how Restate's concurrency control works and how to design your services to take advantage of these automatic consistency guarantees.
